title: 皐月賞の後に・変えてやる

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After Gold City finishes the Satsuki Sho, a few
voices within the audience can be heard
commenting on her running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems they might come around to recognizing
the "real Gold City" if she keeps up this
momentum. Her hopes remain high.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Next, she'll win the Japanese Derby to claim the
reputation of strongest in her generation!
